text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right, then! Next up is some paced running, my
darling ponies!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll think up some individual training exercises for
each of you in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So please... don't take too long. I'd prefer it if
you'd return to my side in a timely matter. Have I
made myself clear?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
U-um! By "individual training exercises," do you
mean you'll train us one-on-one?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but of course! You have that to look
forward to when you get back. Now off you all go!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: You did a great job getting them motivated.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Receiving such high praise from an actual
trainer is a tad embarrassing, I must say.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Still, as their senior and dorm leader, it's my duty
to instruct them properly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In your professional opinion as a trainer, what do
you think I should teach them next?
choice_data_list: The trick to rounding the last corner.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The final corner can certainly be the
make-or-break point in a race. What can I do to
help them gain more experience for that? Hm...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know! I can play tag with them! I'll run as fast as I
can, and they'll have to try to catch me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That way, they'll be able to learn how to sprint
all-out when it counts, while also having fun!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea. Each Umamusume has her
own running style, and it's about time I started
teaching them methods that best suit them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Which means the time has come to conduct my
special heart-racing, all-knowing personality test
for Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Once I've got a handle on who they are, I can
teach them the running method that match them
perfectly!
